roster.name: Fanny Thapa
roster.motto: Like a cable, I never let go.
roster.vision: To put Nepal on the global MLBB map and inspire a generation.
roster.funFact: Once won a tournament final with 5% battery and a prayer.
roster.qaAnswer: I started in a Pokhara cyber cafe. Now we're the biggest org in Nepal. This journey is for every Nepali gamer who dares to dream.

roster.name: Gusion Gurung
roster.motto: Daggers in hand, victory in fate.
roster.vision: To provide international-level coaching to Nepali players.
roster.experience: 5 years, 500+ Mythical Glory, Best Mid Laner 2024.
roster.funFact: My Gusion combo is so fast opponents call it 'Holi colors'.
roster.qaAnswer: I grew up in a small village in Dang. I want to show kids from remote areas that they can make it big.

roster.name: Chou Rai
roster.vision: To bring sports psychology to Nepali esports.
roster.funFact: Opponents once begged me 'don't kick' after my Chou saved a base race.
roster.qaAnswer: I grew up in Jhapa tea gardens. I want to prove that soil doesn't determine your destiny.

roster.name: Lylia Shrestha
roster.motto: Spread gloom, but smile while doing it.
roster.vision: To establish a women's MLBB league in Nepal.
roster.experience: 4 years, first female Mythical Glory player in Nepal.
roster.funFact: My Lylia burst made an opponent say 'There goes my Dashain bonus'.
roster.qaAnswer: I want to prove that women can dominate in gaming too. It's time to change perceptions.

roster.name: Wanwan Karki
roster.vision: To make Nepali esports data-driven with analytics.
roster.experience: 3 years, youngest Mythical Glory, Rookie of the Year 2024.
roster.funFact: Once got a quad-kill and the enemy team said 'forgive us'.
roster.qaAnswer: I'm from Bhaktapur. I want to show that small cities can produce world-class players.

roster.name: Atlas Bhandari
roster.motto: I take the hits, you take the glory.
roster.vision: To create respect for tank/support players in Nepal.
roster.experience: 8 years MOBA, 300+ tournament matches, 70% winrate on Atlas.
roster.funFact: My Atlas ult once caught all 5 enemies. They called it 'khichdi'.
roster.qaAnswer: My father taught me to be a pillar for others. That's what I do as a tank.

roster.name: Selena Magar
roster.vision: To elevate Nepali esports broadcasting to world-class.
roster.experience: 5 years roaming, 80% kill participation, Best Roamer 2025.
roster.funFact: My Selena traps give enemy junglers nightmares.
roster.qaAnswer: Born in the eastern hills, I never imagined this. I want to show that dreams know no geography.

roster.name: Khaleed Shahi
roster.vision: To establish international training camps in Nepal.
roster.experience: 4 years, fastest jungle clear record, 90% first blood rate.
roster.funFact: My sandstorm makes enemies feel like they're in a desert.
roster.qaAnswer: From a remote Karnali village, I want to show that mobile gaming can be an opportunity, not just timepass.

roster.name: Mathilda Tamang
roster.vision: To create a safe and empowering space for female gamers.
roster.experience: 4 years support, 80% winrate, most assists in national league.
roster.funFact: My Mathilda saved three allies at 1 HP to turn the game.
roster.qaAnswer: My mom never stopped me from gaming. I want to honor that trust.

roster.name: Paquito Limbu
roster.vision: To build a culture of healthy competition and sportsmanship.
roster.experience: 5 years, 20+ tournament wins, 1000+ games on Paquito.
roster.funFact: My Paquito combo made an opponent say 'That's not a punch, it's a rockfall'.
roster.qaAnswer: From Ilam tea gardens, I want to show that hard work pays off, no matter where you start.

events.title: Himalayan Clash: Season 1
events.heading: The Inaugural Battle for Supremacy
events.description: 32 teams, 3 days, one champion. The finals went to a heart-stopping game 7 where a last-minute Lord steal changed history. This tournament set the standard for Nepali esports.

events.title: Nepal Esports Festival 2025
events.heading: Where Gaming Meets Culture
events.description: Gaming, Nepali music, art, and food under one roof. Cosplayers, workshops, and international commentary made this a landmark event for cultural exchange through gaming.

events.title: Road to M7: Nepal Qualifiers
events.heading: Chasing the World Stage
events.description: Over 100 teams fought for a single slot at regionals. The sold-out finals saw 'Nepal Gaming Stars' win, igniting nationwide pride. Though they fell at regionals, the journey inspired a new generation.
